name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I'm the ONLY candidate in this primary who:
body:
The fact remains: I'm the only candidate in this primary who has brought people of all backgrounds together to achieve lasting solutions on issues from health care to gun control to climate change--in | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db29/3767808910/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

If there were ever a day to get your support for this campaign on the record, [**_today is the day._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db26/3767808910/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffame-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I'll be making my case to Iowa voters at the Iowa Democrats' Hall of Fame dinner--alongside _eighteen_ other candidates in this primary. And I'll have just five minutes to do it.

[**_Chipping in just $1 will help us build the resources to capitalize on this moment and break out in this packed primary. It 'll take just a minute, and we need all hands on deck. Are you in?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db27/3767808910/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffame-ndnr_ndnr_l2&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db24/3767808910/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffame-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Look--I get it. The field is big. The pace is frenzied. And we're one of the dark horses in this race.

**But here 's what being an underdog does: It gives you grit. It forces you to think outside the box. And it means you don't take even one supporter--or one dollar--for granted.**

I've always been a dark horse--a person people counted out. When I came up with the idea for the Wynkoop Brewing Company, my own mother wouldn't invest. When I ran my first race for Mayor of Denver at age 50, no one could see a path to victory.

**Now, I 'm the only candidate in this primary with a track record of success as an entrepreneur, Mayor, and Governor.**

Some may say success in Colorado can't translate to success across our nation, or that this primary can't be won without courting extremism or drawing stark ideological battle lines.

**The fact remains: I 'm the only candidate in this primary who has brought people of _all_ backgrounds together to achieve lasting solutions on issues from health care to gun control to climate change--in a purple state no less. I'm ready to do that for our nation.**

Lastly, some may say that this primary can't be won without support from DC insiders, huge federal campaign accounts, or years' worth of name recognition and national media coverage.

**To that, I say: This team is unlike any other in this race, and is capable of stepping up unlike any other in this race.**

Team Hick, as we like to call it, is not defined by ideological, geographic, economic, or any other kind of conformity. Team Hick is your friends and neighbors; your servers and teachers; your social workers and your scientists. Team Hick is Democrats from all across the spectrum of our diverse, lively party--and we listen and learn from _all_ of you.

**Team Hick doesn 't shut down conversations: we start them.** We don't fear disagreement; we welcome it. On this team, there is a place for everyone who wants to end our crisis of division and have a hand in achieving progressive goals--together.

[**_If these values ring true for you, before I take the stage at today 's event, can you make your first donation to show you're on board and willing to help us take this all the way?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db25/3767808910/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffame-ndnr_ndnr_l3&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db22/3767808910/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffame-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db23/3767808910/VEsB/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db20/3767808910/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db21/3767808910/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db5e/3767808910/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db5f/3767808910/VEsHBA/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db5c/3767808910/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771615/691c9bd/6dc9507c/11a4db23/3767808910/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

body:
---
| | We'll keep it simple, Peter -- Senator Mitch McConnell has got to go. McConnell says, 'If I'm still the Majority Leader of the Senate, think of me as the Grim Reaper.' He said it himself: he's the Grim Reaper. Under his pathetic excuse for leadership, the Senate has become a graveyard where even uncontroversial legislation that the majority of Americans support goes to die. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - We'll keep it simple, Peter -- Senator Mitch McConnell has got to go. [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0747/72412298/42a84c34/6101e5a3/1387926563/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190609_McGrath_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190609_McGrath_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190609_McGrath_U1_X2") He said it himself: he's the **Grim Reaper.** Under his pathetic excuse for leadership, the Senate has become a graveyard where even uncontroversial legislation that the _majority_ of Americans support goes to die. The Democratic House has passed over **140 bipartisan bills** \-- legislation that would take necessary action to protect Americans' health care, stop climate change, and enact common-sense gun safety reforms -- yet he continues to block all of these attempts to make progress. But luckily Democratic veteran Amy McGrath -- a strong progressive voice who has dedicated her life to serving this country -- is considering a run against McConnell. **YES!!** [**It 's way past time for a change in leadership. Sign our petition now if you think Amy McGrath should challenge Mitch McConnell in 2020!**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0747/72412298/42a84c34/6101e5a2/1387926563/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190609_McGrath_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Itrsquos+way+past+time+for+a+change+in+l&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190609_McGrath_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190609_McGrath_U1_X2") | | | [Add your name](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0747/72412298/42a84c34/6101e5a5/1387926563/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190609_McGrath_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190609_McGrath_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190609_McGrath_U1_X2")

|

There's so much to celebrate.
James is a devoted husband, dedicated father, and a committed public servant. He invests so much in creating a brighter future for both our family as well as his community and his country--a future where we respect one another, respond to differences civilly, and work together to reach solutions.
James being constantly on the road while he campaigns is hard, but I know he can truly change Tennesseans' lives for the better. That makes the sacrifice worthwhile.
For his birthday, I want James to know just how much we believe in him and his campaign.
[_**Please join me in signing James ' birthday card.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2b1/18d6a294/4a18976e/26d6884a/3557512415/VEsF/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190609")
Thank you,
Shana

subject: Why this moment is critical to our campaign
body:
| | |
---
| Team, I've gotta be honest with you -- this is one of those emails asking you to [_**chip in to this campaign.**_](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190609-em?refcode=em_fr_20190609_CB_20190609-fr-CB-dncaudit-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") But there's a really good reason for that. The DNC raised the donor threshold to get on the debate stage to 130,000 individual donors, and for an underdog campaign like ours, getting a chance to be in the national spotlight is something we can't afford to miss out on. I've never run for national office before, and our campaign hasn't spent the past year building an online donor base. We've even refused donations from federal lobbyists and corporate PACs because it's the right thing to do. We really are depending on people like you -- chipping in what you can, when you can -- to get on that stage. **The folks at the DNC will be checking our numbers for the first time soon, and we have to make sure they 're as strong as possible going into the first debate this month.** [_**So, will you make your first donation in this critical moment to help guarantee my spot on the national debate stage?**_](https://act.corybooker. subject: That is A LOT of people
body:
Be a part of this before it’s too late.

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1655%2E150750%2EW-bzZZ)
You wouldn’t BELIEVE how many people have [**contributed any amount that they think is fair to get Bernie’s latest book**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190609-1-60&t=2&akid=1655%2E150750%2EW-bzZZ).
Check it out. This is just a small sample of the contributions rushing in.
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190609-1-60&t=3&akid=1655%2E150750%2EW-bzZZ)
All these folks are contributing what they think is fair, and so we’re sending them Bernie’s book, _Where We Go From Here._ It’s his blueprint for 2020.
[**Want to join them? Contribute ANY amount that you think is fair to Bernie 2020, and we’ll send you Bernie’s new book.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190609-1-60&t=4&akid=1655%2E150750%2EW-bzZZ)
[GET BERNIE'S BOOK](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190609-1-60&t=5&akid=1655%2E150750%2EW-bzZZ)
We know some people can only contribute a little bit. That’s OK. But if you can contribute more, please do — because you’ll help other people get the book AND help our campaign.
One hundred percent of contributions go to our campaign. Be a part of this before the books are all gone.

It wasn't that long ago that I thought I'd never have the right to get married. | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931944b/1cd0ac28/285246ab/356cb320/3253980732/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
It wasn't that long ago that I thought I'd never have the right to get married.

So when Joe Biden came out in support of same-sex marriage, it was a **big** deal for me. I remember my mom calling me in excitement because she had hope there would soon be a world where her son would have the right to marry the one he loved.

Now I'm excited to celebrate Pride month with the ones I love without fear. And I'm so proud to work for Joe Biden's presidential campaign.

In so many cities across the country, folks will be showing their pride by attending and marching in parades -- many even this weekend! I for one cannot wait to get out there and celebrate love, acceptance, and unity at World Pride this year in New York.

**So I just bought my favorite thing from our pride collection. Take a look:** [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931944b/1cd0ac28/285246ab/356cb31f/3253980732/VEsE/ "https://store.joebiden.com/collections/pride?utm_source=email-bsd-20190609Proud-b1_STR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190609Proud&utm_content=b1_STR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1") | | [**SHOP PRIDE »**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931944b/1cd0ac28/285246ab/356cb31f/3253980732/VEsF/ "https://store.joebiden.com/collections/pride?utm_source=email-bsd-20190609Proud-b1_STR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190609Proud&utm_content=b1_STR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

[Buy the gear here. Supplies are limited. name: Andrew Yang
subject: The Freedom to Live
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060919_ia_hof_2&n=1) I just walked off the stage at the Iowa Democratic Party Hall of Fame Celebration. I heard many other candidates offer their vision for the future of America, and, honestly, they're presenting 20th Century solutions to 21st Century problems. Each time I come back to Iowa, more and more people are catching on to the reality on the ground. The economy here already shed many manufacturing jobs, and the retail sector is losing more and more jobs to Amazon each year. Iowa is also home to the biggest truck stop in the country - Iowa 80. Trucking jobs, as well as jobs that support that industry, will dry up in the next 5-10 years as self-driving trucks start to take to the roads. This isn't a problem for the future - it is a problem that many Americans are living through right now. We need to implement the Freedom Dividend of $1,000/month as soon as possible so that we can help Americans transition through this difficult time. It will give them the freedom to start a business and follow their dreams. The freedom to save for a house. The freedom to move for a new opportunity. The freedom from needing to choose between paying medical bills or buying food for their kids. In short, the freedom to live. **[Please help me continue to fight to give people the freedom to live their lives free of economic scarcity by donating $10 today.](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jfxnjZPACP8vaBI3Z4NsO7XrUbIRw0DAuiiDW3uyKJlJw1Lco2Edzd3HTQy3m21jSw7GqLedIe-fg_00J2e1lMs7DfNFPsrkKg3xc8FbGOzh34URer8n3R5tMJjDTOVC_w&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060919_ia_hof_2&n=2 "ActBlue Page for
Andrew Yang")** Together, we can end poverty and unlock the potential of all Americans by investing in our people, families, and communities. -Andrew

[ DONATE $50](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jaBNWLsD3frblJj2FiCYkZw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060919_ia_hof_2&n=5)

**Can you make a donation today?**

Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.

**Join the Yang Gang!**

If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application [here](https://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060919_ia_hof_2&n=6) and someone from our team will reach out.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: What makes this campaign stand out:
body:
The fact remains: I'm the only candidate in this primary who has brought people of all backgrounds together to achieve lasting solutions on issues from health care to gun control to climate change--in | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d89d/1787514164/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

If there were ever a day to get your support for this campaign on the record, [**_today is the day._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d89a/1787514164/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffame-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I made my case to Iowa voters at the Iowa Democrats' Hall of Fame dinner--alongside _eighteen_ other candidates in this primary.

[**_Chipping in just $1 will help us build the resources to capitalize on this moment and break out in this packed primary. It 'll take just a minute, and we need all hands on deck. Are you in?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d89b/1787514164/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffamebump-ndnr_ndnr_l2&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d898/1787514164/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffamebump-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Look--I get it. The field is big. The pace is frenzied. And we're one of the dark horses in this race.

**But here 's what being an underdog does: It gives you grit. It forces you to think outside the box. And it means you don't take even one supporter--or one dollar--for granted.**

I've always been a dark horse--a person people counted out. When I came up with the idea for the Wynkoop Brewing Company, my own mother wouldn't invest. When I ran my first race for Mayor of Denver at age 50, no one could see a path to victory.

**Now, I 'm the only candidate in this primary with a track record of success as an entrepreneur, Mayor, and Governor.**

Some may say success in Colorado can't translate to success across our nation, or that this primary can't be won without courting extremism or drawing stark ideological battle lines.

**The fact remains: I 'm the only candidate in this primary who has brought people of _all_ backgrounds together to achieve lasting solutions on issues from health care to gun control to climate change--in a purple state no less. I'm ready to do that for our nation.**

Lastly, some may say that this primary can't be won without support from DC insiders, huge federal campaign accounts, or years' worth of name recognition and national media coverage.

**To that, I say: This team is unlike any other in this race, and is capable of stepping up unlike any other in this race.**

Team Hick, as we like to call it, is not defined by ideological, geographic, economic, or any other kind of conformity. Team Hick is your friends and neighbors; your servers and teachers; your social workers and your scientists. Team Hick is Democrats from all across the spectrum of our diverse, lively party--and we listen and learn from _all_ of you.

**Team Hick doesn 't shut down conversations: we start them.** We don't fear disagreement; we welcome it. On this team, there is a place for everyone who wants to end our crisis of division and have a hand in achieving progressive goals--together.

[**_If these values ring true for you, can you make your first donation to show you 're on board and willing to help us take this all the way?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d899/1787514164/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffamebump-ndnr_ndnr_l3&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d896/1787514164/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190609_JH_20190609-fr-JH-halloffamebump-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d894/1787514164/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d895/1787514164/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d892/1787514164/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d893/1787514164/VEsHBA/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717eb/691c9bd/6dca1d47/11a4d890/1787514164/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
